features.title: HTTP/1.1 transport posture
features.description: Transport posture feature: define and govern support and applicability semantics for RFC 9112 HTTP/1.1 across runtime, admin API, public API, admin UIX, and public UIX. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1080.

lifecycle.note: Implemented by the transport disclosure and provenance closure slice.
